author: DominicVainMod
content:
@everyone 

Star Atlas Technical Test - Discord Community, We Need Your Help!

Hey everyone!

We're ramping up for an even more exciting Unreal Engine 5 Star Atlas technical test and we're counting on your help to ensure everything runs smoothly before we push to a larger audience.  

In this upcoming test, we'll be introducing a brand new game mode called Surge. Surge is a faction vs. faction vs. faction 3rd person shooter combat game mode focused on bringing glory to your team by eliminating opposing factions and scoring points.    

This is where you all come in – we need you fly into Star Atlas and join us this Saturday at 2 PM ET to put Surge to the test alongside the team and provide us with your feedback. Mark interested on the event below and we'll see you in the Volant Station! (Note: This technical test doesn't have rewards but the public test will)

 | https://discord.com/events/789226204980707409/1220451741875568731
